calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Tamara Monesi, a/k/a Tamara M. Monesi, a/k/a Tammy Monesi.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Joseph P. Graziano, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff NASA Federal Credit Union.
No appearance by defendant Tamara Monesi, a/k/a Tamara M. Monesi, a/k/a Tammy Monesi.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Money Had and Received was filed on July 18, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant defendant Tamara Moneis, a/k/a Tamara M. Monesi, a/k/a Tammy Monesi, occurred on August 5, 2019 and was effectuated on August 15, 2019.
Default as to defendant Tamara Monesi, a/k/a Tamara M. Monesi, a/k/a Tammy Monesi was entered on September 25, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 21, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed May 28, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff NASA Fedferal Credit Union, and against the defaulted defendant Tamara Monesi, a/k/a Tamara M. Monesi, a/k/a Tammy Monesi, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,478.76. (Amount Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,184.36.
Costs - $544.90.

Total - $28,208.02.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
